backend/src/main/java/volunteer/plus/bac.general_idea: Enable Spring asynchronous method execution support.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.4.3 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Introduce Spring AI Bill of Materials to manage versions for AI-related dependencies.
Add AWS Java SDK for S3 to support cloud storage operations.
Include Spring Boot WebSocket starter to enable real-time communication capabilities.
Add Thymeleaf starter for server-side HTML templating.
Include Spring Boot Mail starter to support email sending functionality.
Add Spring Boot Cache starter to enable caching abstractions.
Integrate Spring AI OpenAI starter for connecting to OpenAI models.
Integrate Spring AI Ollama starter for connecting to local Ollama models.
Add Spring AI PDF document reader for processing PDF files in AI pipelines.
Add Spring AI Tika document reader for processing various document formats.
Add Spring AI Redis vector store starter for embedding storage and retrieval.
Include Spring Boot Actuator for production-ready monitoring and management.
Re-add Spring Boot Security starter with explicit versioning for authentication/authorization.
Add JJWT API dependency for JSON Web Token handling.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT support.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization/deserialization.
Add Spring Milestones repository to resolve pre-release Spring AI dependencies.
Explicitly set maven compiler source and target to 8, likely overriding the parent's Java 21 setting for specific compatibility needs.

Update the runtime stage to use OpenJDK 21 slim image instead of OpenJDK 17.

Disable Thymeleaf template location check to allow non-standard template paths or missing templates.

Add configuration for email processing cron jobs and SMTP server settings.

Add configuration for Ollama local AI model integration including chat and embedding settings.

Add configuration for Redis connection and caching settings.
Add configuration for WebSocket authentication skipping and Redis integration.

Pass the API base URL environment variable to the frontend container for runtime configuration.
Add a Redis service with modules to support caching and session management.
Add Redis Insight service for monitoring and debugging Redis data.

frontend/index.html.general_idea: Standardize the HTML doctype declaration to uppercase for better compliance with HTML5 standards.
Integrate external Google Fonts (Montserrat, Roboto Slab, Material Symbols) for improved UI typography and icons.

frontend/index.html.general_idea: Replace the generic framework placeholder title with the specific application name.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Added @react-spring/web to enable physics-based animations in the UI.
Added Redux Toolkit and React Redux to manage global application state.
Added classnames utility to conditionally join CSS class names.
Added Formik to handle form state and validation logic.
Added react-loader-spinner to display loading indicators during async operations.
Added React Router DOM to enable client-side navigation and routing.
Added Yup for schema-based validation, likely paired with Formik.
Added sass-embedded to compile SCSS stylesheets in the build process.
Added vite-plugin-svgr to allow importing SVG files as React components.

frontend/src/main.tsx.general_idea: Wrap the application root with Redux Provider to enable state management across the component tree.
